AdditionalAttributes.ml_enriched_product_description: Enjoy Cholula Original Taco Spice Seasoning Mix, perfect for family dinners. With its unique peppers and medium heat. Order online from Woolworths today.
AdditionalAttributes.description:
Bring the bold, balanced flavour of Cholula to taco night with a unique blend of peppers and signature spices. Just like our Original Hot Sauce, this taco seasoning offers medium spicy heat that's perfect for family dinners.
Make Taco Tuesdays your easiest meal of the week- enjoy beef, chicken or turkey mince tacos in just 15 minutes!
Taco seasoning with the bold, balanced flavour and medium heat of Cholula Original Hot Sauce
Brings Cholula’s Mexican heritage to taco night
Quick and easy prep – tacos are ready in just 15 minutes
Great also as a seasoning for queso or taco dip, soup, chili or burrito rice bowls
For everyday family dinners as well as Mexican food-themed dinner parties
From Cholula, the trusted brand with the hot sauce from Mexico

DIRECTIONS
PREP TIME: 5 minutes | COOK TIME: 10 minutes
Makes 6 (2 taco) servings
1 tbsp (20 mL) oil
500 g beef, chicken or turkey mince
1 pkt Cholula Original Taco Seasoning Mix
1/2 cup (125 mL) water
12 regular flour or corn tortillas, warmed

1. BROWN meat in a large, non-stick pan over med-high heat. Drain fat.
2. STIR in Seasoning Mix and water. Bring to boil.
3. REDUCE heat and simmer 5 minutes or until sauce has thickened, stirring occasionally. Spoon into warm tortillas.
Serve with desired toppings, such as salsa, sour cream and cheese.

CHOLULA TIPS
Use taco filling for quesadillas or enchiladas, in a burrito bowl or stirred into your favourite dip.
Switch up your proteins! Try with sliced chicken, or steak or mix into your favourite veggie taco recipe.

AdditionalAttributes.description:
Cholula Salsa Verde is crafted with fresh tomatillos, onions, jalapeños and poblano peppers for better-tasting authentic Mexican flavor. This green salsa has mild heat and tangy flavor that’s perfect for all types of Mexican foods, from tacos and tostadas to burritos, enchiladas and nachos. Like our Hot Sauces, Salsa Verde is made from family recipes that’s passed down through generations. We use fresh ingredients including tomatillos, onions, green bell peppers and chili peppers to create a salsa that brings a zesty burst of brightness with a subtle kick of heat. Serve simply as a dip with tortilla chips or over chicken, seafood, ground beef dishes, veggies, scrambled eggs, and frittatas. It makes every dish delicioso!
- Salsa Verde is made with fresh tomatillos, onions, jalapeños and poblano peppers
- Mild salsa that’s ideal for taco nights and other family dinners
- The perfect dip for tortilla chips
- Adds authentic Mexican flavor to everything from tostadas and enchiladas to seafood and chicken
- From Cholula, the trusted brand with the hot sauce from Mexico

AdditionalAttributes.ml_enriched_product_description: Enjoy Cholula Chilli Garlic Taco Spice Seasoning Mix for taco night. Its mild garlic & chilli blend, a family favourite. Shop now at Woolworths.
AdditionalAttributes.description:
Rediscover taco night with Cholula Chilli Garlic Taco Seasoning Mix – a robust blend of garlic, chilli peppers, and Cholula’s signature spices inspired by the iconic Cholula Hot Sauce. This aromatic garlic chilli seasoning delivers mild heat and bold, garlicky depth that transforms beef, chicken, or seafood into flavour-packed tacos in just minutes. Crafted to capture authentic Mexican flavour and Cholula’s celebrated balance of spice and warmth, it’s the easy way to add rich, chilli-garlic character to any meal.

 

  • Quick and easy prep – tacos ready in just 15 minutes
  • Mild heat – bold, balanced flavour that appeals to the whole family
  • Delivers authentic Mexican flavour, inspired by Cholula’s heritage
  • Versatile taco spice seasoning – great for tacos, nachos, burritos, chili, or dips
  • From Cholula, the trusted brand for authentic Mexican flavour and heat

 

How to Make Chili Garlic Tacos

PREP TIME: 5 minutes | COOK TIME: 10 minutes | MAKES: 6 (2 taco) servings

 

You Will Need:

  • 1 tbsp (20 mL) oil
  • 500 g beef strips
  • 1 pkt Cholula Chili Garlic Taco Seasoning Mix
  • ½ cup (125 mL) water
  • 12 regular flour or corn tortillas, warmed

 

To Prepare:

  1. HEAT oil in large, non-stick pan over med-high heat. Add beef and cook until just browned.
  2. STIR in Seasoning Mix and water. Bring to boil.
  3. REDUCE heat and simmer, stirring occasionally for 5 minutes or until sauce has thickened and beef is cooked. Spoon into warm tortillas. Serve with toppings such as salsa, sour cream and cheese.

 

Cholula Tips

  • Use taco filling in burritos, breakfast tacos or as a bold nacho topping.
  • Switch up your proteins – try this Seasoning with mince beef, prawns or white fish fillets for a seafood-inspired taco night.
  • Add a dash of fresh lime juice before serving for extra brightness.

 

About Cholula

Born in Mexico, Cholula has been sharing authentic Mexican flavour and heat for generations. Known for its balanced spice, rich pepper blend and moderate heat, Cholula celebrates the craft and tradition of true Mexican hot sauce.

 

Cholula Chilli Garlic Taco Seasoning Mix brings that legacy to life with a rich, garlicky blend of peppers and spices that delivers the unmistakable taste of Cholula in every taco.

AdditionalAttributes.ml_enriched_product_description: Craving bold Mexican flavour? Cholula Salsa Smoky Chipotle is a bold and authentic solution for taco nights or BBQs. Order online from Woolworths today.
AdditionalAttributes.description:
Cholula Smoky Chipotle Salsa brings a bold blend of authentic flavours from the heart of Mexico. We start with fresh tomatoes and tomatillos, then fire-roast the tomatoes and combine with chipotle peppers for a salsa that has smoky flavour and a healthy kick of heat.

If you love the deep smokiness of our Chipotle Hot Sauce, you'll want to try a jar of our Chipotle Salsa. From tacos and tostadas to chili, burritos, scrambled eggs and frittatas, a spoonful adds rich flavour with bold, craveable heat.

We love it on anything barbecued, including chicken, steak, grilled prawn tacos, and beef or veggie burgers.

Our salsa is a product of Mexico, where the Cholula heritage is passed down through generations of flavour and where friends and family say "more, por favor!”
- Smoky Chipotle Salsa is made with fire-roasted tomatoes, tomatillos and chipotle peppers
- Medium heat salsa that’s ideal for taco fiestas and game day parties
- The perfect dip for tortilla chips
- Adds authentic Mexican flavour to everything from tostadas and burritos to BBQ chicken
- From Cholula, the trusted brand with the hot sauce from Mexico

AdditionalAttributes.description:
A unique blend of smoky chipotle peppers along with the signature spices of Cholula Hot Sauce to add rich, bold flavor to taco night. Use this taco seasoning mix to prepare a family-friendly chicken taco dinner with medium heat in just 15 minutes.

- Taco seasoning with a blend of smoky, sweet chipotle peppers and Cholula’s signature spices
- Brings Cholula’s Mexican heritage to taco night
- Quick and easy prep – tacos are ready in just 15 minutes
- Great also as a chipotle seasoning for queso or taco dip, chili and even eggs
- From Cholula, the trusted brand with the hot sauce from Mexico

MAKE SMOKY CHIPOTLE TACOS
PREP TIME: 5 minutes | COOK TIME: 10 minutes
Makes 6 (2 taco) servings
INGREDIENTS
1 tbsp (20 mL) oil
500 g skinless chicken breast, cut into strips
1 pkt Cholula Smoky Chipotle Taco Seasoning Mix
1/2 cup (125 mL) water
12 regular flour or corn tortillas, warmed

DIRECTIONS 1. HEAT oil in large, non-stick pan over med-high heat. Add chicken and cook until just browned.
2. STIR in Seasoning Mix and water. Bring to boil.
3. REDUCE heat and simmer, stirring occasionally for 5 minutes or until sauce has thickened and chicken is cooked through. Spoon into warm tortillas.
Serve with desired toppings, such as pickled red onion, cheese and fresh coriander.

CHOLULA TIPS
Use taco filling to top tostatas, stuff enchiladas or in your favourite fajita recipe. Switch up your proteins! Try with mince beef or sliced steak or use to season slow cooked pork.

AdditionalAttributes.description:
Turn every Tuesday into Taco Tuesday with the help of Old El Paso™ Mild Taco Sauce. Made with paprika, cayenne pepper, and jalapeno peppers, Old El Paso™ mild taco topping sauce adds a hint of spice and vibrant Mexican flavour to your favourite homemade tacos. Whether you prefer soft tortillas or crunchy taco shells, stuff with your favourite meat filling (or vegetarian alternative), add your favourite toppings like cheese and guacamole, then finish this with flavoursome taco sauce. Not sure the ‘mild’ heat level is for you? Opt for Old El Paso™ medium or hot alternatives. Better yet, try them all to see what heat level you can handle. Perfect for a midweek Mexican feast or weekend get-togethers, make tacos a regular on your weekly shopping list. Old El Paso™ Mild Taco Sauce works as a topping on 10 tacos.

Tip: Make it meat free and swap out the meat for veggies to make it vegan.

This product is suitable for vegetarians and vegans.

Spice up your night with Old El Paso™ Fajita Spice Mix. The perfect blend of capsicums and paprika adds delicious Mexican flavours to your favourite fajitas or tacos.Spice up your night with Old El Paso™ Fajita Spice Mix. The perfect blend of capsicums and paprika adds delicious Mexican flavours to your favourite fajitas or tacos.

Spice up your night with Old El Paso™ Fajita Spice Mix. The perfect blend of capsicums and paprika adds delicious Mexican flavours to your favourite fajitas or tacos. Just sprinkle the fajita seasoning mix on 600g of chicken thighs or breast, add 1 onion and 2 capsicums, then follow the simple instructions on the back of the pack. After heating the tortillas you'll have made ready to eat Mexican style fajitas in less than 25 minutes — ideal for Fajita Friday if you're feeding a large group. Vegan? No problem. Simply swap the meat for mushrooms. 1 pack of Old El Paso™ Fajita Spice Mix flavours up to 10 fajitas. So bring your loved ones together and share the rich flavours of Mexican food with your whole family.

This product is suitable for vegans.

AdditionalAttributes.description:
If you like baked beans, you’re going to love refried beans and no one does them better than Old El Paso™.

If you like baked beans, you’re going to love refried beans and no one does them better than Old El Paso™. Despite their name, these tasty Mexican beans are not fried — they are made from hearty pinto beans and blended with Mexican spices to create a delicious paste. Simply warm them up in the microwave or heat them on the stove, then mix with your favourite tomato salsa and use as a topping for nachos, tacos, burritos, and more. You can even use them as a dip with tortilla chips! With just a hint of chili, these refried beans will be loved by kids and vegans, alike. Perfect for a midweek Mexican feast or weekend get-togethers, make refried beans a regular on your weekly shopping list.
